theatres.title: Obsession
theatres.review: After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon…
theatres.fullReview: After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon discovers that some desires come at a dark, sinister price.
theatres.take: Critics liked it, especially the performances.

theatres.title: Voicemails for Isabelle
theatres.review: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
theatres.fullReview: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
theatres.take: Critics have been largely positive on this one.

theatres.title: Minions & Monsters
theatres.review: This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters…

similar.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge on the Run
Chickenhare and the Hamster of Darkness
Puss in Boots: The Last Wish

theatres.fullReview: This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters onto the world and then banded together to try and save the planet from the mayhem they had just created.
theatres.take: Critics have been largely positive on this one.
theatres.hook: Premiered at the Annecy International Animation Film Festival.

theatres.title: Evil Dead Burn
theatres.review: After her husband's abrupt death, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws. As one by one they transform into Deadites, she comes to discover that the vows she…
theatres.fullReview: After her husband's abrupt death, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws. As one by one they transform into Deadites, she comes to discover that the vows she took in life survive even in death.
theatres.take: Opinions split right down the middle on this one.

theatres.title: Wings of Dread
theatres.review: Air police officer Gu Chaoyang encounters a hijacking crisis on his flight back to China. With his extremely high professional ethics, he fights desperately to…
theatres.fullReview: Air police officer Gu Chaoyang encounters a hijacking crisis on his flight back to China. With his extremely high professional ethics, he fights desperately to stop the hijacker, and a life-and-death struggle that takes place at an altitude of ten thousand meters begins.

theatres.title: Idhayam Murali
theatres.review: A young man navigates the complexities of unrequited love, finding that even as years pass and life takes unexpected turns, certain emotions remain deeply…
theatres.fullReview: A young man navigates the complexities of unrequited love, finding that even as years pass and life takes unexpected turns, certain emotions remain deeply embedded in his heart.

ott.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation
ott.review: When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

similar.title: The Aristocrat's Otherworldly Adventure: Serving Gods Who Go Too Far
KamiKatsu: Working for God in a Godless World
I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince so I Can Take My Time Perfecting My Magical Ability

ott.fullReview: When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every opportunity to live the life he's always wanted. Armed with new friends, some freshly acquired magical abilities, and the courage to do the things he's always dreamed of, he's embarking on an epic adventure—with all of his past experience intact!
ott.take: Critics have been largely positive on this one.

ott.title: Silo
ott.review: In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…
ott.fullReview: In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously, engineer Juliette starts to uncover shocking secrets and the truth about the silo.
ott.take: Critics liked it, especially the performances and production design.

ott.title: X-Men '97
ott.review: The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a…
ott.fullReview: The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a dangerous and unexpected new future.
ott.take: Critics loved it — special praise for the writing and action.

ott.title: House of the Dragon
ott.review: The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.
ott.fullReview: The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights. In the case of the Targaryens, their slow fall begins when King Viserys breaks with a century of tradition by naming his daughter Rhaenyra heir to the Iron Throne. But when Viserys later fathers a son, the court is shocked when Rhaenyra retains her status as his heir, and seeds of division sow friction across the realm.
ott.take: Critics have been largely positive on this one.

ott.title: The Eternal Fragrance
ott.review: When the Sea Calamity strikes and the Divine Tree appears, whoever claims its fruit gains power over all creation, sparking a bloody war among the immortals,…

similar.title: Till The End of The Moon

ott.fullReview: When the Sea Calamity strikes and the Divine Tree appears, whoever claims its fruit gains power over all creation, sparking a bloody war among the immortals, demons, and monsters. A century later, Lei Xiuyuan seeks out Qingqiu orphan Xiaobangchui to save his brother. Fate brings them to Chufeng Academy, where loyal friends give her warmth and love begins to bloom. As their bond deepens from friendship to something more, the truth of her origins slowly unravels, threatening everything they've built.

ott.title: Love Has Fireworks
ott.review: Qian Fei, an employee in a bank, was planning a fulfilling life. But after being abandoned by her fiancé, she had to redefine her life.

similar.title: Please Feel At Ease Mr. Ling

ott.fullReview: Qian Fei, an employee in a bank, was planning a fulfilling life. But after being abandoned by her fiancé, she had to redefine her life. Li Yifei, from a rich family, always prioritized his career. His girlfriend couldn't endure poverty and left. To cover her mortgage, Fei rent out a room to Yifei, and they became collaborators. Fei bravely faced challenges and grew through the process. Their journey was marked by collisions, but they fell in love and decided to face the future together.

ott.title: Dog Man
ott.review: Once the frontman of rock band Mazhi Go, Chou Ko-chieh rode his looks and raw talent to instant superstardom.
ott.fullReview: Once the frontman of rock band Mazhi Go, Chou Ko-chieh rode his looks and raw talent to instant superstardom. Years later, he has become a delusional, washed-up musician, unable to write a note and barely tolerated by his wife, Chen Li-hsuan. How did his 25-year-old self — who had the world at his feet — turn into this?

ott.title: Double Occupancy
ott.review: Rajini transforms between woman by day and man by night, hiding this gender swap from partners creating tangled complications.
ott.fullReview: Rajini transforms between woman by day and man by night, hiding this gender swap from partners creating tangled complications.

ott.title: The Bear
ott.review: Carmy, a young fine-dining chef, comes home to Chicago to run his family sandwich shop. As he fights to transform the shop and himself, he works alongside a…
ott.fullReview: Carmy, a young fine-dining chef, comes home to Chicago to run his family sandwich shop. As he fights to transform the shop and himself, he works alongside a rough-around-the-edges crew that ultimately reveal themselves as his chosen family.
ott.take: Critics loved this one; reception has been close to universal acclaim.

ott.title: Enola Holmes 3
ott.review: Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.

similar.title: Sherlock Holmes: A Game of Shadows

ott.fullReview: Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.
ott.take: Critics are genuinely split on this one.

comingSoon.title: The Odyssey
comingSoon.review: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War.
comingSoon.fullReview: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War. Throughout his voyage, he is forced to confront the whims of gods, mythological monsters, and trials that stretch both his cunning and his humanity to the breaking point.

comingSoon.title: Ip Man: Kung Fu Legend
comingSoon.review: In 1950s Hong Kong, British merchants and Chinese triads have joined forces to expand their territory, forcibly…

similar.title: Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon: Sword of Destiny

comingSoon.fullReview: In 1950s Hong Kong, British merchants and Chinese triads have joined forces to expand their territory, forcibly demolishing factories without regard for public welfare. This move draws fierce opposition from Ip Man, standing up for the workers, he faces pressure from all sides. Framed for murder, he is sent to prison. Within the prison walls, the triads set multiple deadly traps. Can Ip Man overcome these trials, escape the danger, and clear his name?

comingSoon.title: Beast
comingSoon.review: MMA legend Patton James, now a commercial fisherman, is pulled back into the cage when his brother is in danger.
comingSoon.fullReview: MMA legend Patton James, now a commercial fisherman, is pulled back into the cage when his brother is in danger. Reuniting with his old coach Sammy, he commits to one final fight in one championship against the brutal champion Xavier Grau.

comingSoon.title: Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender
comingSoon.review: Avatar Aang, the world's last Airbender, learns of an ancient power that could save his culture from extinction.

similar.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge on the Run
Chickenhare and the Hamster of Darkness
Ramayana : The Legend of Prince Rama

comingSoon.fullReview: Avatar Aang, the world's last Airbender, learns of an ancient power that could save his culture from extinction. With the help of his friends, he embarks on a global quest to find it before it falls into the wrong hands and threatens to upend the peace they sacrificed everything to achieve.

comingSoon.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day
comingSoon.review: Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn't remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends…
comingSoon.fullReview: Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn't remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter Parker he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.

comingSoon.title: Vishwanath & Sons
comingSoon.review: Sanjay Vishwanath is an acclaimed professional handgunner in his 40s with a major stake in fame and wealth.

similar.title: Anne of Green Gables: The Sequel

comingSoon.fullReview: Sanjay Vishwanath is an acclaimed professional handgunner in his 40s with a major stake in fame and wealth. When he comes across a woman named Maddy in her 20s, their dynamic poses many issues that they must come to terms with.

comingSoon.title: The Rope Curse 4: Kuntilanak
comingSoon.review: A forbidden exorcism is livestreamed in Indonesia, awakening the legendary female spirit Kuntilanak.
comingSoon.fullReview: A forbidden exorcism is livestreamed in Indonesia, awakening the legendary female spirit Kuntilanak. What begins as an online spectacle quickly turns deadly. In Taiwan, Mila watches the ritual—and becomes the curse’s first victim. Soon, mysterious deaths and violent possessions follow. When Yulan collapses and is found to have lost part of her soul, it becomes clear that this is not an isolated incident, but a transnational curse. Seeking answers, Mila’s son returns her ashes to Indonesia, hoping to uncover the truth behind her death.

comingSoon.title: Forgotten Island
comingSoon.review: While celebrating their last night together, high school graduates and best friends Jo and Raissa stumble upon a…

similar.title: Tinker Bell and the Lost Treasure
Chickenhare and the Hamster of Darkness

comingSoon.fullReview: While celebrating their last night together, high school graduates and best friends Jo and Raissa stumble upon a mysterious portal that transports them to the fantastical island of Nakali. When they discover that the memories of their entire friendship are the price for returning home, Jo and Raissa will race to find a way to leave the island before they forget each other forever.
